chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1233 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4872/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 12.08.2025 Mr. Natho Lalwani, Advocate along with petitioners Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Khalil Ahmed Metlo, Deputy PG for State Inspector Sajjad Hussain, SIO PS Pinyari, Hyderabad ASI Abdul Razak, Investigating Officer of the case SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP, Sukkur SIP Ghulam Nabi Shaikh, PS ‘C’ Section, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Khalilullah Abbasi, Advocate files vakalatnama of Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abbasi, Advocate on behalf of Respondents No.7 and 8, whereas, statements have been filed by official respondents, same are also taken on record. Pursuant to directions ASI Abdul Razak of Police Station, Pinyari, District Hyderabad Investigating Officer of Crime No.114 of 2025 Police Station Pinyar Hyderabad is present and submits that the case is under investigation and he has arrested two of the accused namely Muhammad Ayoub and Mst. Amina. He submits that as per directions of this Court today he has recorded statement of petitioner No.1, namely Mst. Esha and placed copy of the same on record. Per her statement, petitioner No.1 Mst. Esha has categorically denied the allegations contained in the impugned FIR as same are nothing but bundle of lies and she is passing happily marital life with petitioner No.2 and submits that respondent No.8/her Cousin Imran Khan has lodged a false FIR just to disturb her peaceful married life.

Per her statement, petitioner No.1 Mst. Esha has categorically denied the allegations contained in the impugned FIR as same are nothing but bundle of lies and she is passing happily marital life with petitioner No.2 and submits that respondent No.8/her Cousin Imran Khan has lodged a false FIR just to disturb her peaceful married life. She has further stated that she being adult and sui juris has entered into nikkah with petitioner No.2, namely Muhammad Rauf according to her own free will and in consonance of injunctions of Page 2 of 2 Islam. She, therefore, submits that she would prefer to go with her husband. In view of statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Esha, it appears that purpose of instant petition has been served. Learned counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of instant petition. Order accordingly. Investigating Officer ASI Abdul Razak of Pinyari Hyderabad is directed to submit report under section 173 Cr.P.C before the Court having jurisdiction in the light of statement of petitioner Mst. Esha within ten days. Judge Judge ARBROHI
